clues.clue: This month, in an abbreviated way
Suddenly slowing ceremony, maniac takes over
Team bagging rubbish over in newspaper office
The main available period for tourism
Appearing in Times, say, is Times writer
Body in water dissolved in seconds?
Stone left in position to finish
Clay pots I love for dressing
One rash he had to get treated
Aim of those ahead of foe?
Training to get upset girl in bed
Greek hero deviously sly in exploits

competition.prizeinfo: The prize for the first correct solution to be opened will be an original edition of League of the Lexicon, the bestselling quiz game about words and language, created by Joshua Blackburn, author of The Language-Lover’s Lexipedia. The Collins English Dictionary & Thesaurus will be awarded for the next three. To enter, complete the crossword and submit your entry. 18+ only. Closing date is 23:59 on the first Saturday after publication. Full T&Cs apply. Printed entries can be sent to: The Sunday Times Crossword 5208, PO Box 29, Colchester, Essex CO2 8GZ.
